name: norse-toolbox
description: Norse mythology themed Codex task orchestration scaffold anchored by Odin.

interface.longDescription: A Codex task orchestration scaffold themed around Norse mythology, with Odin as the first entry point for deciding role selection and execution order.
defaultPrompt: Use Odin to decide whether this task needs Heimdall, Mimir, Thor, Tyr, Forseti, and Bragi, then give the minimum execution order.
Start with Odin, collect the goal, constraints, and done conditions, and route investigation work to Heimdall before any design or implementation begins.
Have Odin produce an implementation flow that includes Thor for changes, Tyr for test updates, Forseti for review, and Bragi for final documentation only when each role is necessary.
